name: ebenova-scope-guard
description: AI-powered contract scope enforcement for freelancers and agencies. Detects scope creep in client messages, generates professional pushback responses, and creates formal change orders. Now jurisdiction-aware across 18 jurisdictions (Nigeria, Kenya, Ghana, South Africa, UK, US federal + CA/NY/TX/FL, Canada federal + ON/BC/Quebec, EU, India, UAE, Singapore).

tools.name: analyze_scope_violation
tools.description: Analyze a client message for scope violations against original contract terms. Optional jurisdiction parameter injects statute-aware analysis (CAMA / ERA 1996 / BCEA / Employment Act 2007 / etc.).

tools.name: generate_change_order
tools.description: Generate a formal change order document for out-of-scope work. Optional jurisdiction parameter ensures jurisdiction-appropriate signature blocks and governing-law clause.

planned_tools.name: generate_legal_document
planned_tools.description: Available today via the ebenova-legal-docs MCP server (separate package). Will be merged into this server in a future release.

planned_tools.name: generate_invoice
planned_tools.description: Roadmap — separate ebenova-invoices MCP server planned.

planned_tools.name: extract_from_conversation
planned_tools.description: Roadmap — see existing /v1/extract/conversation API endpoint for HTTP access.

planned_tools.name: check_usage
planned_tools.description: Roadmap — see existing /v1/keys/usage API endpoint for HTTP access.
